rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b), while Educ. Code §38.003 governs dyslexia screening and treatment in schools. The provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no operational interaction.
quote: The State Board of Education shall identify the necessary criteria and elements that provide for universal screening for dyslexia and related disorders for students in kindergarten and first grade.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text pertains to dyslexia screening/treatment and has no nexus to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
